guidelines.core_message: TeaDojo serves handcrafted bubble tea made with fresh ingredients and customizable sweetness for everyday moments.
do: Highlight flavor, freshness, and drink customization
Use short, energetic copy with clear calls to action
Show social moments and product close-ups
Promote seasonal drops and bundle offers
dont: Make medical or health cure claims

campaign_state.objective: Increase in-store visits and online orders for TeaDojo's spring flavor lineup.

payload.caption: Dennis is loving the NEW Blue Coconut Latte! 💙✨ Handcrafted, fresh, and only here for spring. Ready to customize yours? #DennisApproved #TeaDojo
payload.image_prompt: Dennis (from DENNIS.jpg) holding a vibrant Blue Coconut Latte, close-up of the drink with visible blue color and fresh toppings, playful and energetic vibe, bright lighting, fun background, TeaDojo branding.
payload.cta: Try the Blue Coconut Latte today!
payload.visual_hint: Product close-up, Dennis featured, vibrant blue drink, energetic composition
payload.target_segment: Gen Z and Millennials, bubble tea lovers, food trend followers

ranking.rationale: Matched topic Flavor Discovery and visual Cup Close-Up.

payload.caption: Spring’s coolest sip is here! Dennis can’t get enough of the Blue Coconut Latte. 🌴💙 Only at TeaDojo for a limited time!
payload.image_prompt: Dennis (from DENNIS.jpg) sipping Blue Coconut Latte, animated overlays with fresh ingredient icons, limited-time badge, playful text, bright and fun story format.
payload.visual_hint: Animated overlays, freshness highlights, Dennis in action, blue drink visible
payload.target_segment: Gen Z and Millennials, after-work crowd

ranking.rationale: Matched topic Flavor Discovery and visual Cup Close-Up.

payload.cta: Duet or stitch with your reaction!
payload.visual_hint: Humorous reaction, candid moment, blue drink close-up
payload.target_segment: Gen Z, TikTok users, trend followers

strong.evidence: Higher save rate on limited-edition flavor posts
Improved completion rates on short step-by-step videos

comments.text: Can I choose 25 percent sugar with extra pearls?
The mango limited drop sold out fast, please restock this weekend.
Do you have a two-cup bundle for after work?

comment_clusters.label: Customization Questions
comment_clusters.summary: Shoppers want clearer options for sugar, ice, and toppings.

comment_clusters.label: Demand for Limited Flavors
comment_clusters.summary: Seasonal launches drive urgency and repeat visits.

review_summaries.summary: Customers praise drink flavor and freshness; peak-hour queue speed can improve.
questions: What is the fastest pre-order option?
Which branch has the latest seasonal stock?

review_summaries.summary: Strong repeat orders for fruit teas; combo pricing performs well on weekdays.
questions: Can bundles mix two different drinks?

competitor_posts.hook: Build your own drink in 15 seconds

competitor_summaries.notes: High urgency promotions around weekend drops.
Strong TikTok execution with concise tutorial content.
Consistent promotions centered on affordable tea runs.

post_objects.caption: Choose your sweetness and toppings in 3 steps.
This weekend only: lychee rose fruit tea.

lessons.lesson: Product close-up visuals with concrete flavor names outperform generic cafe lifestyle hooks.
evidence: Instagram seasonal flavor posts delivered +16 percent saves versus baseline

lessons.lesson: Always include one customization explainer and one seasonal drop post in each weekly cycle.
evidence: Consistent conversion lift when both assets are present

lessons.lesson: First-frame cup close-up with topping texture improves watch-through and taps.
evidence: Higher CTR on cup close-up motif cluster

pain_points: Lack of clear customization options for sugar, ice, and toppings
Limited availability and restocking of seasonal/limited flavors
Uncertainty about bundle options and mix-and-match possibilities
likes: Positive sentiment towards customization options (e.g., sugar level, extra pearls)
High demand and excitement for limited/seasonal flavors
Praise for drink flavor and freshness
Strong repeat orders for fruit teas
Combo pricing performing well on weekdays
dislikes: Limited availability of popular seasonal flavors leading to quick sellouts
Lack of clarity on bundle offerings and mix options
root_causes: Insufficient communication or options for product customization
High demand for limited edition flavors without adequate restocking plans
Operational inefficiencies causing slow service during peak times
Unclear or limited bundle product offerings
unanswered_questions: Can customers choose specific sugar levels and toppings for the new mango pomelo drink?
Will the mango pomelo drink be available as part of bundles or mix-and-match combos?
What is the fastest pre-order option to avoid queues?
Which branches will have the latest seasonal stock of the new drink?
Will there be restocking plans for the mango pomelo drink similar to previous limited drops?

visual_patterns: Cup Close-Up with motifs of cup, pearls, foam, fruit, straw
Pour Action Shot featuring pour, splash, motion, ice, tea
Friends Hangout showing friends, group, smile, table, store
confidence_notes: High momentum (0.87) and engagement (0.43) for seasonal fruit flavor drops supports focusing on mango pomelo as a limited-edition seasonal flavor.
Customization how-to reels show strong engagement (0.40) and momentum (0.79), indicating video content demonstrating drink customization will resonate well.
Emerging interest in low-caffeine tea alternatives and after-work tea run bundles suggests potential for product positioning and bundle offers but with moderate confidence.
Visual content emphasizing close-up shots of the drink and pour action have strong engagement rates (0.45 and 0.41 respectively), ideal for social media campaign creatives.
Rising ingredient and menu item entities like brown sugar pearls and mango green tea align well with the mango pomelo drink launch, indicating audience familiarity and interest.
Web signals show relevant social media posts and guides on beverage launches, reinforcing the importance of multi-channel marketing, influencer collaborations, and pre-launch buzz.
Overall confidence is high for leveraging seasonal fruit flavor themes and customization video content, moderate for bundle offers and low-caffeine positioning.

competitor_report.strategy_summary: Leverage the tropical and fresh appeal of the mango pomelo drink by emphasizing natural ingredients and refreshing taste, inspired by iTea's successful seasonal launch approach. Incorporate interactive and engaging content such as quick customization demos similar to Sweet Talk's TikTok strategy to boost engagement. Offer value-driven promotions targeting key segments like students or bundle buyers, drawing from Each A Cup's value bundle theme. Utilize Instagram and TikTok as primary platforms, with a posting cadence of 4-5 posts per week, including urgency-driven weekend promotions and limited-time offers to create excitement and drive trial.
recurring_themes: Seasonal and limited-time flavor launches to create urgency and excitement
Customization and quick demo content to engage users and showcase product versatility
Value bundles and student-friendly offers to attract budget-conscious consumers
Visual product close-ups highlighting fresh, natural ingredients
Use of social proof and influencer-style endorsements to build trust
oversaturated_angles: Generic seasonal launch messaging without unique differentiation
Basic buy 2 save 15% or simple discount offers without added experiential value
Standard customization demos that do not highlight unique product features
Student combo promotions that are common and may not stand out
whitespace_opportunities: Highlight the unique combination of mango and pomelo with storytelling around tropical freshness and health benefits
Create immersive sensory content (e.g., ASMR, close-up pouring shots) to emphasize texture and real fruit bits
Introduce limited-edition packaging or collectible items tied to the launch to increase shareability
Leverage user-generated content campaigns encouraging customers to share their own mango pomelo drink creations or moments
Develop a campaign around sharing and social connection, positioning the drink as perfect for gatherings and celebrations
copy_risk_warnings: Avoid generic claims like 'best mango drink' without substantiation to prevent skepticism
Steer clear of overused discount language that may dilute brand premium perception
Ensure customization claims are genuine and deliverable to avoid customer disappointment
Do not replicate competitor hooks verbatim to maintain originality and avoid legal issues

planner_output.strategic_summary: For TeaDojo's mango pomelo drink launch, the campaign will leverage the high momentum of seasonal fruit flavor drops and the proven engagement of customization explainer content. The strategy centers on showcasing the drink's freshness, unique mango-pomelo combination, and customizable options, while addressing audience pain points around availability, customization clarity, and bundle offers. Visual storytelling will focus on product close-ups, pour action shots, and social moments to drive excitement and shareability. The campaign will run primarily on Instagram and TikTok, with a mix of must-run assets (seasonal drop announcement, customization how-to, bundle offer), test assets (ASMR/immersive content, UGC prompts), and optional exploratory assets (limited-edition packaging tease, influencer collab). KPIs will track engagement, conversion, and repeat purchase intent.
content_pillars: Seasonal Flavor Spotlight: Highlight the mango pomelo drink as a limited-edition, fresh, and tropical offering.
Customization & Personalization: Demonstrate sugar, ice, and topping options with clear, energetic how-to content.
Social & Share Moments: Position the drink as perfect for group hangouts, after-work runs, and celebrations.
Value & Bundle Offers: Promote mix-and-match combos and weekday bundle pricing to drive trial and repeat visits.
hypotheses: Seasonal fruit flavor drops with close-up visuals will outperform generic lifestyle content in saves and shares.
Customization explainer videos will increase conversion and reduce unanswered questions about drink options.
Bundle offer posts will drive higher weekday footfall and appeal to student and group segments.
Immersive sensory content (e.g., ASMR, pour shots) will boost engagement and dwell time on posts.
User-generated content prompts will increase organic reach and social proof.

must_run_assets.visual: Cup close-up with mango, pomelo, pearls, and fresh fruit motifs
must_run_assets.copy: Fun, energetic, clear CTA to try the new drink

must_run_assets.visual: Step-by-step video showing sugar, ice, and topping choices for mango pomelo drink
must_run_assets.copy: Short, friendly, answers top customization questions

must_run_assets.visual: Group moment or table shot with multiple drinks, highlighting bundle pricing
must_run_assets.copy: Clear offer details, urgency for weekday trial

test_assets.visual: Slow-motion pour, splash, and ice shots with real fruit bits
Call for customers to share their mango pomelo moments or customizations

optional_exploratory_assets.visual: Teaser of collectible cup or packaging for mango pomelo drink
optional_exploratory_assets.copy: Hints at scarcity, encourages early trial

optional_exploratory_assets.visual: Local influencer trying the drink, highlighting freshness and customization

kpis: Instagram saves and shares on seasonal drop post
Video completion rate and engagement on customization how-to
Footfall or order uplift for mango pomelo drink (if trackable)
Repeat purchase intent (survey or digital feedback)

creative_brief.objective: Drive awareness, trial, and repeat visits for the new mango pomelo drink by leveraging seasonal excitement, customization clarity, and social moments.
creative_brief.target_audience: Gen Z and young millennials (16-30), bubble tea fans, students, and after-work groups, with a focus on Instagram and TikTok users.
key_messages: Mango Pomelo: Limited-edition, handcrafted, and bursting with tropical freshness.
Customize your way: Choose your sugar, ice, and toppings for the perfect sip.
Perfect for sharing: Grab a bundle for friends or after-work treats.
creative_brief.visual_style: Bright, fresh, and energetic. Use close-ups, pour action, and group moments. Highlight real fruit, pearls, and drink texture. Avoid generic or overly corporate visuals.
creative_brief.tone_of_voice: Fun, fresh, and friendly. Use short, energetic copy with clear calls to action. Avoid medical claims, overpromising, or fear-based messaging.
mandatory_elements: Product name and visual (mango pomelo drink)

compliance_result.summary: Most assets are missing the required disclosure 'availability varies by outlet', which is a mandatory compliance element. One asset also lacks clear adherence to the brand tone guidelines. These issues must be addressed to ensure full compliance with brand and platform policies.
top_risks: Non-compliance with required disclosures may lead to regulatory or platform penalties.
Inconsistent brand tone reduces brand integrity and may confuse consumers.
Potential for consumer misinformation due to missing disclaimers.
revision_instructions: Add the required disclosure text 'availability varies by outlet' to all assets.
For asset_003, enhance the copy to better reflect the brand tone requirements: fresh, friendly, and quality.
Review all assets to ensure full compliance with platform-specific rules and banned claims.

critique_points: The campaign plan is comprehensive and well-aligned with the target audience of Gen Z and young millennials, focusing on Instagram and TikTok which are appropriate channels.
Content pillars and hypotheses are clearly defined and logically connected to the campaign objectives and KPIs.
Creative assets effectively reflect the strategic themes, with strong visual and copy alignment, and good use of sensory and social engagement elements.
Predicted CTR scores are reasonable and consistent with the chosen topics and visuals, indicating expected good performance.
The tone of voice and visual style guidelines are clear and well-suited to the brand and audience.
Some predicted CTRs for value/bundle content are lower compared to flavor and customization pillars, suggesting potential need for stronger hooks or more engaging creative in that area.
The campaign could benefit from more explicit integration of influencer collaborations in the asset list to leverage social proof more strongly.
While UGC prompts are included, additional incentives or clearer calls to action might enhance participation rates.
The plan does not explicitly address potential challenges such as supply constraints or competitive landscape which could impact campaign effectiveness.
proposed_learnings: Monitor engagement and conversion metrics closely for bundle offer assets and consider iterative creative refreshes to boost appeal.
Test different influencer content formats and messaging to optimize authenticity and shareability.
Enhance UGC prompts with contests or rewards to increase organic reach and social proof.
Consider adding contingency messaging or FAQs to address availability or customization confusion proactively.
Leverage data from initial campaign days to refine targeting and asset prioritization, especially for lower-performing segments.

final_output.request: Can you plan for me next week's campaign for the launch of my new drink, mango pomelo drink
final_output.strategic_summary: For TeaDojo's mango pomelo drink launch, the campaign will leverage the high momentum of seasonal fruit flavor drops and the proven engagement of customization explainer content. The strategy centers on showcasing the drink's freshness, unique mango-pomelo combination, and customizable options, while addressing audience pain points around availability, customization clarity, and bundle offers. Visual storytelling will focus on product close-ups, pour action shots, and social moments to drive excitement and shareability. The campaign will run primarily on Instagram and TikTok, with a mix of must-run assets (seasonal drop announcement, customization how-to, bundle offer), test assets (ASMR/immersive content, UGC prompts), and optional exploratory assets (limited-edition packaging tease, influencer collab). KPIs will track engagement, conversion, and repeat purchase intent.
hypotheses: Seasonal fruit flavor drops with close-up visuals will outperform generic lifestyle content in saves and shares.
Customization explainer videos will increase conversion and reduce unanswered questions about drink options.
Bundle offer posts will drive higher weekday footfall and appeal to student and group segments.
Immersive sensory content (e.g., ASMR, pour shots) will boost engagement and dwell time on posts.
User-generated content prompts will increase organic reach and social proof.
content_pillars: Seasonal Flavor Spotlight: Highlight the mango pomelo drink as a limited-edition, fresh, and tropical offering.
Customization & Personalization: Demonstrate sugar, ice, and topping options with clear, energetic how-to content.
Social & Share Moments: Position the drink as perfect for group hangouts, after-work runs, and celebrations.
Value & Bundle Offers: Promote mix-and-match combos and weekday bundle pricing to drive trial and repeat visits.
